utility_evaluation.REASONING:

- travel_dates: Provided (specific dates July 20–24, 2024) — fully specified, though not fall as per user, but specification exists.
- transportation: Requires flight details with costs. Provided fields: type, provider, cost. Missing specific flight details (e.g., flight numbers, times); however, the format only says “flight details with costs” and includes cost; arguably under-specified but minimally included. Since details are vague, this may be considered insufficient. I will treat as not fully specified because “flight details” implies specifics beyond generic provider.
- accommodation: Hotel selection with costs. Provided name, duration, cost — sufficiently specified.
- activities: Selected activities with costs. Provided list with names and costs — specified.
- additional_services: Any extra services with costs. Provided as null — this is acceptable (explicitly none), so included.
- total_budget: Complete cost breakdown. A single total number is provided (585) but no breakdown beyond item costs. However, costs are itemized in transportation, accommodation, activities; total matches sum. Considered sufficiently specified.
Count fully specified: destination (1), travel_dates (2), transportation (not fully) (0), accommodation (3), activities (4), additional_services (5), total_budget (6). Thus 6/7.
